THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WYLIE, KENNETH ELLIS, SHIRLEY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 398 HAIGHT ST. #8, SAN FRANCISCO, CA. 94102 $1,384.06 RENT, $350.00 ATTORNEY FEES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,734.06, LEASE FORFEITED, PLTF WAIVES COSTS.

9:00AM DEPT 8, JUDGE ROBERT A. BARCLAY. C/C FOR TRIAL BY COURT, PLTF PRESENT THROUGH COUNSEL, MICHAEL S. ROSSOFF, DEFTS FAILING TO APPEAR. ORAL EVIDENCE GIVEN. CAUSE SUBMITTED. COURT RULES JUDGMENT FOR PLTF. PLTF TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.
